name: PostgreSQL 中间件基线 (CIS + 等保 2.0)
description: PostgreSQL 13/14/15/16 安全基线. 参考 CIS PostgreSQL 16 Benchmark.

rules.title: pg_hba.conf 禁 trust 远程
rules.description: trust 等于无认证, 远程仅允 md5/scram-sha-256/cert

fix.command: F=/var/lib/pgsql/data/pg_hba.conf; [ -f "$F" ] || { echo "config not found: $F"; exit 1; }; [ -f "$F.mxbak" ] || cp "$F" "$F.mxbak"; sed -ri 's/^(host[[:space:]].*[[:space:]])trust$/\1scram-sha-256/' "$F"; su - postgres -c "psql -c 'SELECT pg_reload_conf()'" >/dev/null 2>&1
fix.suggestion: pg_hba.conf 远程行改 md5 或 scram-sha-256

fix.command: F=/var/lib/pgsql/data/postgresql.conf; [ -f "$F" ] || { echo "config not found: $F"; exit 1; }; [ -f "$F.mxbak" ] || cp "$F" "$F.mxbak"; if grep -Eq '^[[:space:]]*password_encryption[[:space:]]*=' "$F"; then sed -ri "s|^[[:space:]]*password_encryption[[:space:]]*=.*|password_encryption = scram-sha-256|" "$F"; else echo "password_encryption = scram-sha-256" >> "$F"; fi; su - postgres -c "psql -c 'SELECT pg_reload_conf()'" >/dev/null 2>&1 || { mv -f "$F.mxbak" "$F"; echo 'reload failed, rolled back'; exit 1; }

rules.title: listen_addresses 仅内网
rules.description: 默认 localhost, 远程仅内网 IP

fix.command: F=/var/lib/pgsql/data/postgresql.conf; [ -f "$F" ] || { echo "config not found: $F"; exit 1; }; [ -f "$F.mxbak" ] || cp "$F" "$F.mxbak"; if grep -Eq '^[[:space:]]*listen_addresses[[:space:]]*=' "$F"; then sed -ri "s|^[[:space:]]*listen_addresses[[:space:]]*=.*|listen_addresses = 'localhost'|" "$F"; else echo "listen_addresses = 'localhost'" >> "$F"; fi; su - postgres -c "psql -c 'SELECT pg_reload_conf()'" >/dev/null 2>&1 || { mv -f "$F.mxbak" "$F"; echo 'reload failed, rolled back'; exit 1; }

command -v openssl >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo 'openssl missing, manual'; exit 1; }; D=/var/lib/pgsql/data; F=$D/postgresql.conf; [ -f "$F" ] || { echo "config not found: $F"; exit 1; }; [ -f "$F.mxbak" ] || cp "$F" "$F.mxbak"; if [ ! -f "$D/server.crt" ] || [ ! -f "$D/server.key" ]; then openssl req -x509 -newkey rsa:2048 -nodes -keyout "$D/server.key" -out "$D/server.crt" -days 3650 -subj /CN=localhost || exit 1; fi; chown postgres:postgres "$D/server.key" "$D/server.crt"; chmod 600 "$D/server.key"; if grep -Eq '^[[:space:]]*ssl[[:space:]]*=' "$F"; then sed -ri "s|^[[:space:]]*ssl[[:space:]]*=.*|ssl = on|" "$F"; else echo "ssl = on" >> "$F"; fi; su - postgres -c "psql -c 'SELECT pg_reload_conf()'" >/dev/null 2>&1 || { mv -f "$F.mxbak" "$F"; echo 'reload failed, rolled back'; exit 1; }
for D in /var/lib/pgsql/data /var/lib/postgresql/14/main; do [ -d "$D" ] || continue; chown -R postgres:postgres "$D" && chmod 700 "$D"; done

F=/var/lib/pgsql/data/postgresql.conf; [ -f "$F" ] || { echo "config not found: $F"; exit 1; }; [ -f "$F.mxbak" ] || cp "$F" "$F.mxbak"; if grep -Eq '^[[:space:]]*log_connections[[:space:]]*=' "$F"; then sed -ri "s|^[[:space:]]*log_connections[[:space:]]*=.*|log_connections = on|" "$F"; else echo "log_connections = on" >> "$F"; fi; su - postgres -c "psql -c 'SELECT pg_reload_conf()'" >/dev/null 2>&1 || { mv -f "$F.mxbak" "$F"; echo 'reload failed, rolled back'; exit 1; }

F=/var/lib/pgsql/data/postgresql.conf; [ -f "$F" ] || { echo "config not found: $F"; exit 1; }; [ -f "$F.mxbak" ] || cp "$F" "$F.mxbak"; if grep -Eq '^[[:space:]]*log_disconnections[[:space:]]*=' "$F"; then sed -ri "s|^[[:space:]]*log_disconnections[[:space:]]*=.*|log_disconnections = on|" "$F"; else echo "log_disconnections = on" >> "$F"; fi; su - postgres -c "psql -c 'SELECT pg_reload_conf()'" >/dev/null 2>&1 || { mv -f "$F.mxbak" "$F"; echo 'reload failed, rolled back'; exit 1; }

F=/var/lib/pgsql/data/postgresql.conf; [ -f "$F" ] || { echo "config not found: $F"; exit 1; }; [ -f "$F.mxbak" ] || cp "$F" "$F.mxbak"; if grep -Eq '^[[:space:]]*log_statement[[:space:]]*=' "$F"; then sed -ri "s|^[[:space:]]*log_statement[[:space:]]*=.*|log_statement = 'ddl'|" "$F"; else echo "log_statement = 'ddl'" >> "$F"; fi; su - postgres -c "psql -c 'SELECT pg_reload_conf()'" >/dev/null 2>&1 || { mv -f "$F.mxbak" "$F"; echo 'reload failed, rolled back'; exit 1; }

rules.title: 无 superuser 非系统账户

param: su - postgres -c "psql -t -c \"SELECT count(*) FROM pg_user WHERE usesuper = true AND usename NOT IN ('postgres')\"" 2>/dev/null | xargs

rules.title: 禁止 untrusted extension 加载
rules.description: 防加载恶意 C 扩展

fix.suggestion: 运维白名单 shared_preload_libraries; CREATE EXTENSION 需 superuser
